tool.name: Compile Divergence Budget
tool.description: Aggregate all recorded divergences into a budget assessment (Phase 4). Determines if analogy can proceed despite mismatches.

total_cost.description: Aggregate cost of all divergences (0-1 scale)

can_proceed.description: Whether the analogy can proceed despite divergences

ai.systemPromptSection:
### compile_divergence_budget
Aggregate divergences into a proceed/no-proceed decision. This is Phase 4 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "total_cost": 0.3, "can_proceed": true, "scope_restrictions": ["Valid only for overparameterized networks"], "required_patches": ["Use continuous-time SGD formulation"], "summary": "Analogy viable with scope restrictions and one patch"}
